steps.title: Use a custom regression with r and s
steps.content: The function is already in the form $f(x)=rx+s$. Enter two table points, $(-8,48)$ and $(8,-96)$, and run the matching regression $y_1 \sim r x_1+s$.

steps.title: Read r and s
steps.content: Desmos gives $r=-9$ and $s=-24$, so $f(x)=-9x-24$. The table checks because $f(-8)=72-24=48$ and $f(8)=-72-24=-96$.

steps.title: Answer rs
steps.content: Now multiply: $$rs=(-9)(-24)=216$$ The correct free-response answer is 216.
